title: Section 22B
content: 1[22B.Conveyance facilities.—Every Judge shall be entitled to a staff car and 2 [two hundred litres of of fuel every month] or the actual consumption of fuel per month, whichever is less.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 38 of 1986, s. 5, for sub-sections 22B and 22C (w.e.f. 1-11-1986). 2. Subs. by Act 20 of 1996, s. 4, for "one hundred and fifty liters of petrol every month or the actual consumption of Petrol" (w.e.f. 11-1-1996).
